title: plocama eriantha
intro: Plocama eriantha, also known as the yellow-flowered Plocama, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Plocama eriantha include its potential to aid in digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Plocama eriantha can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
